input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance

data.original_question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation and YTD performance
data.intent: User wants a comprehensive overview of their equity portfolio including composition, daily changes, sector breakdown, and annual performance trend.

decomposition.sub_question: What are the current stock holdings in my portfolio?
decomposition.title: Portfolio Holdings
decomposition.description: Detailed list of all current equity positions in the portfolio.

decomposition.sub_question: What is the total profit and loss for the portfolio today?
decomposition.title: Daily P&L
decomposition.description: Total monetary profit or loss generated by the portfolio today.

decomposition.sub_question: How is the portfolio distributed across different sectors?
decomposition.title: Sector Allocation
decomposition.description: Percentage breakdown of the portfolio's value by industry sector.

decomposition.sub_question: What is the portfolio performance trend from the start of the year to now?
decomposition.title: Year-To-Date Performance
decomposition.description: Time-series trend of portfolio returns since the beginning of the year.
